_comment: Curated trophy counts used ONLY to ground LLM/deterministic preview prose (see honours.py). A team's value is either a list of winning years (short, high-value comps) or a plain integer count (broad comps). WC and EURO list EVERY winner (finite sets), so honours.py treats them as COMPLETE: a finalist absent from the list has zero titles and we say so. UCL and COPA are counts for the known multi-winners and are NOT complete, so an absent team is simply omitted rather than asserted to have none. To extend: edit this file; the plugin re-reads it on the next reload. Keep years accurate.

COPA._note: Dormant: Copa America is not currently a sourced competition, so these are never injected. Counts kept for when it is added.
